headline: Is Devon Energy Corporation (DVN) the Best Stock to Buy in a Rising Market on Coterra Acquisition?
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is one of the best stocks to buy in a rising market, according to Wall Street analysts. On April 11, the waiting period under the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvements Act for the proposed merger of Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) and Coterra Energy expired without objection. With the expiry, the proposed merger satisfies […]
